title: ink hills
description: Pen and ink landscape — crosshatch shading, wobbly hand-drawn strokes, and scribble trees on warm paper.
notes: Every line has intentional wobble added via random() offsets, simulating an unsteady hand. Crosshatching uses canvas clipping regions — each terrain segment gets its own clip path, then parallel lines are drawn at varying angles and densities based on a noise-driven 'darkness' value. Darker areas get a second cross-hatch pass at a perpendicular angle. The birds are just two arcs meeting at a point.
